design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, functional medical UI. High visual clarity for clinical settings. Color is function only - UI is monochrome until action is required.

layout_and_spacing.card_style: bg-white border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white font-bold hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors rounded-md
buttons.secondary: bg-surface border border-border text-text_primary hover:bg-surface_hover transition-colors rounded-md

components.tables: Shadcn UI tables, cardless if possible, dense row spacing (py-2), sharp borders.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI inputs, max rounded-md, visible focus ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary)
components.tabs: Shadcn UI tabs, override h-9 to h-auto, clear contrast for active state.

specific_features.homunculus_svg: Create an interactive SVG component for front/back body map. Map joints (shoulders, elbows, wrists, MCPs, PIPs, knees, ankles, MTPs). Use toggle states: neutral (gray), tender (blue), swollen (red), both (purple).
specific_features.pasi_map: Interactive SVG with 4 zones: Head, Trunk, Upper Limbs, Lower Limbs. Click to set erythema, induration, and desquamation.
specific_features.calculators: Implement real-time calc logic for DAS28, CDAI, SDAI, BASDAI, ASDAS, DAPSA, SLEDAI, HAQ, PASI. Show inputs grouped logically in bento cards.
specific_features.export: Use jsPDF and react-csv for exporting reports.
specific_features.language: Italian (it-IT) mandatory across all labels, placeholders, and indices.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle border darkening, crisp shadow lift (-translate-y-0.5) on cards.
motion_and_interactions.joint_click: Fast color fill transition (0.15s ease) on SVG paths.

image_urls.description: Doctor interacting with patient, suitable for login page background or welcome screen.

icons.style: duotone or bold for active states, regular for inactive.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use Italian for all text (e.g., 'Anagrafica Pazienti', 'Aggiungi Paziente', 'Conta Articolare').

Ensure the interactive homunculus is a custom React SVG where each joint path has an onClick handler to cycle through states: Nessuno -> Dolente (Tender, Blue) -> Tumefatta (Swollen, Red) -> Entrambe (Both, Purple).
Use Shadcn UI components for complex forms and layout structure.
Maintain high contrast (WCAG AA) to ensure medical professionals can read data easily. Apply Archetype 4 rules (Swiss & High-Contrast).
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, joint SVG paths, and inputs for testing.
Implement the requested calculators (DAS28, CDAI, SDAI, BASDAI, ASDAS, DAPSA, SLEDAI, HAQ, PASI) using standard clinical formulas.
Use Recharts for rendering patient index trends over time.
For Export, use jsPDF for PDF generation and standard CSV export methods.
Yarn add @phosphor-icons/react for clinical dashboard iconography.
